docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WOODRIDGE, JAMELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ARGYLE, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506. PLAINTIFF JAMELVIN WOODRIDGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREGORY ARGYLE IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED UNTIMELY ON 1/23/18. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED ON 1/08/18 AND WISHES TO PROCEED WITH THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY WOODRIDGE, JAMELVIN ARGYLE, GREGORY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARGYLE, GREGORY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODRIDGE, JAMELVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARGYLE, GREGORY $2,206.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,316.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
